title: Handling Don't-Care Conditions in Karnaugh Maps
description: A flowchart showing the decision process for simplifying a Boolean function using Karnaugh Maps when don't-care conditions are present.
relationships: The process starts with an Input Variable Combination, which is checked if it is a Don't-Care. If yes, the designer can choose to Assign as 1 for Grouping to create a larger group for simplification or Assign as 0 to ignore it. This choice leads to the final Simplified Boolean Function Output.
